entries.title: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
entries.description: OpenAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of with the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.

entries.title: Patronus AI lands $50M to build ‘digital worlds’ that stress-test AI agents
entries.description: Agent-testing startup Patronus AI, founded by former Meta AI researchers, is experiencing nearly insatiable demand, its investor says.

entries.title: Anthropic’s Claude is winning over paid consumers, a market owned by ChatGPT
entries.description: Despite ChatGPT's commanding market lead, consumers who pay for AI have been increasingly choosing Anthropic's Claude, data shows.

entries.title: General Intuition’s $2.3B bet that video games can train AI agents for the real world
entries.description: General Intuition has raised $320 million to scale AI trained on millions of hours of gameplay, betting action data can help AI develop something closer to human intuition.

entries.title: Databricks’ former AI chief thinks he can cut AI’s power bill by 1,000x
entries.description: Un-0 is an image-generation system tool that shows for the first time how the company's technology can replicate conventional AI systems.

entries.title: Netris raises $15M Series A from a16z to help AI neoclouds go live faster
entries.description: Netris provides software that runs on network switches, and offers a platform that helps neocloud operators reduce the time it takes to go live.

entries.title: 2 days left to save up to $190: Join 1,000+ founders and investors at TechCrunch Founder Summit
entries.description: Two days left to lock in your spot at TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 and save up to $190 before Early Bird rates expire on June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register today.

entries.title: Adobe acquires image and video enhancement tool maker Topaz Labs
entries.description: Adobe said that it will integrate Topaz Labs' tools across its apps.

entries.title: Amazon ups India bet with fresh $13B AI infrastructure investment
entries.description: Amazon’s latest India investment comes as global tech companies race to expand AI infrastructure in the country.

entries.title: Apple Vision Pro exec is reportedly leaving for OpenAI
entries.description: Paul Meade, the Apple vice president in charge of the Vision Pro headset, is reportedly leaving the company to join OpenAI’s hardware team.

entries.title: The fittest founder in the room got cancer. Here’s how he used AI to fight back.
entries.description: When confronted with cancer, Connor Christou fed everything tied tied to his regime — blood results, scan data, wearable output, journal entries — into Claude.

entries.title: Asian AI startups launch Mythos-like  models as Anthropic’s export ban drags on
entries.description: New models are launching in Asia that promise Mythos-like capabilities without fear of an export ban. U.S. AI labs may never recover this enormous market.

entries.title: Trump Admin releases Anthropic  Mythos to be used by more than 100 US companies, agencies
entries.description: Over 100 companies and government agencies are reportedly authorized to use Mythos 5, including their non-American employees.
